chunks.title: Call to Humility for Babylon
chunks.reason: A direct address commanding Babylon to descend from her throne and take on the role of a slave woman.

chunks.title: Judgment for Arrogance
chunks.reason: A prophetic declaration explaining the cause of Babylon's fall due to her lack of compassion and false sense of permanence.

chunks.title: Sudden Destruction Foretold
chunks.reason: A warning to the sensual queen that her confidence in magic will be shattered by sudden calamity.

chunks.title: Failure of Babylonian Sorcery
chunks.reason: A rhetorical challenge to the astrologers and sorcerers, concluding that their efforts will prove futile against God's judgment.
